review_notes: Pure soot_0 silhouette pass (toSilhouette) of the standing and seated_listen frames, composited side by side for the cast six-silhouette check. Dominant feature: tall, slim, upright figure with a wedge-shaped short bob, straight shoulder line, visible arm gaps at the sides, and a flared apron/waistcoat hem breaking the hip line — distinct from arkady's narrow pencil-stroke-with-tiny-forward-head and galina's wide bun-topped block (only other completed cast silhouettes at time of authoring).
